name: Meteoros Minimalistas
Burbujas Flotantes
Grid Minimalista
Constelaciones
Onda Radial
Píxeles Flotantes
template:
<style>
        :doodle {
          @grid: 12 / 100vw 100vh;
          gap: 2px;
        }
        @size: @r(20px, 60px);
        background: hsl(@r(240), 30%, 50%);
        border-radius: 4px;
        position: absolute;
        left: @r(100%);
        top: @r(100%);
        animation: fadeInOut @r(3s, 6s) ease-in-out infinite;
        animation-delay: -@r(6s);
        
        @keyframes fadeInOut {
          0%, 100% { opacity: 0.3; transform: scale(0.8); }
          50% { opacity: 0.8; transform: scale(1); }
        }
      </style>

name: Tipografía Dinámica
template:
<style>
        :doodle {
          @grid: 15 / 100vmax;
        }
        :after {
          content: @p('◯', '△', '□', '◇', '○', '▽', '◁', '▷');
          color: hsla(@r(360), 70%, 70%, @r(.6, .9));
          position: absolute;
          font-size: @r(3cqmax, 7cqmax);
          font-family: sans-serif;
          font-weight: 300;
          animation: drift @r(8s, 15s) ease-in-out infinite;
          animation-delay: -@r(15s);
        }
        
        @keyframes drift {
          0%, 100% { transform: translateY(0) rotate(0deg); opacity: 0.6; }
          50% { transform: translateY(-20px) rotate(180deg); opacity: 0.9; }
        }
      </style>

name: Espiral Minimalista
Trazos Artísticos
template:
<style>
        :doodle {
          @grid: 1 / 100vw 100vh;
          background-size: 100%;
          background-image: @svg(
            <svg viewBox="0 0 100 175">
              @M40(<path
                stroke-width="@r(.3, .8)"
                stroke="@p(#60569e, #e6437d, #ff7e5f)"
                fill="none"
                stroke-linecap="round"
                d="M @r(100) @r(175) Q @r(100) @r(175) @r(100) @r(175)"
              />)
            </svg>
          );
        }
      </style>

name: Geometría Moderna
Visualizador Minimalista
Confeti Elegante
Super Doodle Creativo (Hector)
